primary_concern: Sepsis-3 criteria met with concurrent AKI and coagulopathy
clinical_summary: Patient demonstrates elevated lactate (4.2 mmol/L), persistent thrombocytopenia (88-95 K/uL), and leukocytosis (14.2 K/uL) consistent with sepsis. Bilirubin elevation (1.4 mg/dL) and hemoglobin of 9.8 g/dL suggest multi-organ involvement. AKI progression noted with stage 1 (Cr 2.1 mg/dL) escalating to stage 3 (Cr 8.9 mg/dL) within 24 hours, though the highest creatinine value was excluded as an outlier.

prioritized_risks.explanation: Lactate >2 mmol/L, WBC >12 K/uL, and creatinine elevation meet Sepsis-3 criteria for suspected infection with acute SOFA increase ≥2
prioritized_risks.threshold: Suspected infection plus acute SOFA increase ≥2

prioritized_risks.explanation: Creatinine elevation meets KDIGO criteria for AKI stage 1 progressing to stage 3
prioritized_risks.threshold: Creatinine rise ≥0.3 mg/dL in 48h or urine output <0.5 mL/kg/hr for ≥6h

prioritized_risks.explanation: Platelets <100 K/uL meets SOFA coagulation score threshold for coagulopathy
Lactate >2 mmol/L present but vasopressor requirements and fluid resuscitation status unknown
prioritized_risks.threshold: Vasopressor-dependent hypotension with lactate >2 mmol/L post-fluids

recommended_actions: Initiate sepsis protocol per Sepsis-3 guidelines including broad-spectrum antibiotics
Monitor AKI progression with hourly urine output and serial creatinine
Order blood cultures and source control investigation for infection
Consider platelet transfusion if thrombocytopenia <50 K/uL with bleeding risk
Reassess fluid resuscitation and vasopressor requirements for septic shock exclusion
doctor_handoff: Review excluded creatinine outlier (8.9 mg/dL) for specimen integrity. Confirm infection source and assess for need for ICU admission if not already present.

disease_progression.observation: Baseline abnormalities: WBC 14.2 K/uL, Hgb 9.8 g/dL, Bilirubin 1.4 mg/dL
AKI stage 1 (Cr 2.1 mg/dL) with platelets 95 K/uL
AKI stage 3 (excluded Cr 8.9 mg/dL) with platelets 88 K/uL

excluded_outliers.reason: Rapid change detected — Creatinine changed by 6.5 mg/dL within 6.0h (max allowed: 2.0). Probable measurement error or specimen issue. Section 15.2 — rise > 2.0 mg/dL in < 6h.
